meta.race_name: Encore Educational For Early Years Supplies Handicap Chase

rankings.name: Realisation (FR)
key_positive_factors: Consistent form with three consecutive in-frame finishes
key_risks: First time tackling the 3m 2f staying trip
0-8 record over fences prior to this outing

rankings.name: Upfordebate (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Course and distance specialist with strong track record
Four-time winner under leading jockey Brian Hughes
key_risks: Returns to track after a somewhat flat effort at Carlisle

rankings.name: Alright Dai (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Successful chase debut at 2m3f showing good jumping ability
Significant untapped potential over staying distances
Improving profile and unexposed over fences
key_risks: Substantial step up in trip from 2m3f to 3m2f
Relatively inexperienced compared to veteran field

rankings.name: Le Grand Vert (FR)
key_positive_factors: Recent winner at Ayr (3m, Soft) showing current wellbeing
key_risks: Needs things to go his own way to deliver

rankings.name: Great Notions (FR)
key_positive_factors: Proven in Point-to-Points and Hunter Chases
Capable of better if rediscovering early-season form
key_risks: Recent slump in form including a 'Pulled Up' effort
Has 'a point to prove' after disappointing recently

rankings.name: Ribeye
key_positive_factors: Previous winner at similar tracks like Hexham
key_risks: Dreadful recent form including a poor hurdles run
Appears to be on the downgrade

pace_analysis.insight: A moderate tempo will suit tactical stayers like Upfordebate while posing a significant stamina query for the favorite, Realisation, over this new marathon trip.
